Project Overview.Tagline: Your life, secured on the chain.
Project Overview.Mission: Provide a decentralized, secure, and permanent digital sanctuary for personal memories (stories, photos, milestones) using blockchain and IPFS technology.

Multi-Chain Wallet Authentication.Aptos Integration: Support for Petra Wallet and other Aptos-compatible wallets.
Multi-Chain Wallet Authentication.Bitcoin Support: Integration with BitPay for Bitcoin Testnet4 authentication.
Multi-Chain Wallet Authentication.Burner Wallet: A 'Guest Mode' for frictionless onboarding without requiring a browser extension.
Multi-Chain Wallet Authentication.Message Signing: Secure authentication flow using cryptographic signatures.

Decentralized Memory Storage.IPFS Pinning: Media files (images, videos) are pinned to IPFS via Pinata for permanent storage.
Decentralized Memory Storage.Metadata Management: Memory details (title, description, category, date) stored in a secure backend database and linked via IPFS CID.
Decentralized Memory Storage.On-Chain Anchoring: Optional ability to anchor memory hashes to the Aptos blockchain for verifiable proof of existence.

Interactive User Experience.Dynamic Dashboard: Real-time stats showing memory count, Aptos balance, and Bitcoin wallet status.
Interactive User Experience.Visual Timeline: A chronological 'Journey Builder' to navigate through life milestones.
Interactive User Experience.Quick Actions: Instant upload and story creation tools.
Interactive User Experience.Premium Design: Glassmorphic UI with dark mode support and smooth animations.

Frontend.Styling: Tailwind CSS & Shadcn UI state management: React Context API (WalletContext, AuthContext)
